course_short_description: Micro-learning demo for bulk import testing.
course_full_description: This is a longer description used for course detail screens. Replace URLs with real assets before production.
short_description: Your first 60 seconds with a guest.
scenario: A couple enters and looks at the wall of bottles without speaking.
flashcard_1: Smile and acknowledge them before pitching any bottle.
flashcard_image_1: Open questions like What brings you in today? beat What grape do you like?
flashcard_2: If they pick up a bottle they are inviting a conversation — do not interrupt with a pitch.
flashcard_image_2: What should you do first when guests arrive?
question_1: Greet warmly and use an open question
q1_option_a: Wait silently until they ask you
q1_option_c: How do you know someone is curious about a wine?

course_short_description: Micro-learning demo for bulk import testing.
course_full_description: This is a longer description used for course detail screens. Replace URLs with real assets before production.
scenario: The guest asks Do you have anything under twenty euros?
flashcard_1: Price questions are buying signals — answer directly then offer a story.
flashcard_image_1: Start with mid-range bottles before jumping to prestige unless they ask.
flashcard_2: Never dismiss a budget — match enthusiasm to their range.
flashcard_image_2: What is a good first move after a budget question?
question_1: Acknowledge the number and show two options in range
q1_option_a: Ignore the budget and pour the most expensive wine
q1_option_c: Is mid-range a safe default for unsure buyers?
q1_correct: Yes it builds trust before upsell

course_short_description: Deuxième cours fictif pour tester plusieurs cours dans un fichier.
course_full_description: Description complète optionnelle pour la vitrine catalogue.
short_description: Court module sur la réponse à une objection.
scenario: Le client dit Je réfléchis et se dirige vers la sortie.
flashcard_1: Une objection est une demande d information pas un refus définitif.
flashcard_image_1: Proposer un essai ou un échantillon abaisse la pression d achat.
flashcard_2: Reformuler ce que vous avez entendu avant de répondre.
flashcard_image_2: Que signifie souvent Je réfléchis en vente?
question_1: Le client a besoin de sécurité ou de preuve
q1_option_a: Le client ne veut plus rien acheter
q1_option_c: Quelle reformulation est la plus utile?
q1_correct: Si je comprends bien vous hésitez entre deux profils
q1_image_url: Oubliez ce que j ai dit
